meaning: adj.柔软的,逢迎的,顺从的vt.使柔软,使顺从vi.变柔顺
examples: Paul was incredibly supple and strong.
These exercises will help to keep you supple.
This mask leaves your complexion feeling soft and supple.
But of course, the star of the production was Dessay with her supple and beautiful voice.
This is meant to be a supple transaction on both sides of the giving equation.
